name: Kisaan Fund
description: Direct investment funding from ₹100 Cr pool for agri-tech businesses.
notes: Direct equity investment from a dedicated ₹100 Cr agri-tech pool.

name: Propel Grant
description: Grant for service-based and manufacturing businesses across most sectors.
notes: Open even to unregistered entities. ₹25 L for service-based, ₹35 L for manufacturing-based.

name: Venture Fund (MH)
description: Maharashtra-only venture fund for DPIIT-recognised Pvt Ltd startups.
notes: Maharashtra only. DPIIT recognised Pvt Ltd companies.

name: CGSS Scheme
description: Credit Guarantee Support on loans for DPIIT-recognised startups.
amount_label: Credit Guarantee on Loan up to ₹20 Cr
notes: DPIIT recognised startups only.

name: Evolve-Tech Funding
description: Equity-based funding for revenue-generating DPIIT startups.
notes: Revenue generating startups with DPIIT recognition.

name: RKVY RAFTAAR
description: Government grant for agri, food and animal sector startups and individuals.
notes: Rajiv Gandhi Krishak Saathi Yojana - Remunerative Approaches for Agriculture and Allied sector Rejuvenation.

name: Startup Support Scheme (SSS)
description: Broad-based startup funding across most sectors.
notes: Pan-India scheme for registered business entities.

name: AgriTech Grant (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu grant for agri-tech startups at early or growth stage.
notes: Tamil Nadu only. ₹10 L for early-stage startups, ₹25 L for growth/expansion stage.

name: Idea Grant
description: Early-stage grant open to everyone including unregistered entities.
notes: Available even for unregistered entities at idea stage.

name: TIDE 2.0
description: Technology Innovation Development and Entrepreneurship grant.
notes: Broad eligibility across all registered entity types and sectors.

name: Global Impact Challenge
description: International challenge funding for high-impact businesses.
notes: International challenge funding for businesses with global impact potential.

name: Growth Grant
description: Grant for young entrepreneurs aged 22 or younger.
notes: Applicants must be aged 22 or younger.

name: Agri-Sure Fund
description: Large equity fund for DPIIT agri startups.
notes: DPIIT recognised startups in agri sector.

name: Seed Fund
description: DPIIT early-stage grant or debt/equity for entities under 2 years old.
notes: DPIIT recognised startup. Entity must be less than 2 years old.

name: Agri-Tech Innovation Grant
description: Grant for farmers, farmer groups, and agri entrepreneurs.
notes: For Individual Farmer, Farmer Group, Pvt Ltd, LLP, Partnership, Proprietorship and individual entrepreneurs.

name: Biomanufacturing Grant
description: Grant in aid for bio-manufacturing in agri-tech and healthcare sectors.
notes: Specifically for Pvt Ltd and LLP companies in bio-manufacturing.

name: Spark Grant
description: Large grant for businesses with at least one female founder.
notes: At least 1 female founder required.

name: Social Fund
description: Grant or investment for non-profit or mission-driven entities under 10 years old.
notes: CSR-type international program. 4-5 months response time. Organization must be under 10 years old.

name: Fund for SC/ST Entrepreneurs
description: Equity funding exclusively for SC/ST entrepreneurs with DPIIT or MSME recognition.
notes: 100% SC/ST candidate ownership. DPIIT or MSME approved.

name: NAIFF
description: Subsidised loan for startups, MSMEs, and agri-based entities.
amount_label: Loan up to ₹2 Cr (3% Interest Subsidy)
notes: For Startups, MSMEs, Individuals, FPOs, SHGs, Cooperatives, APMCs and other agri-based entities.

name: Financial Assistance for SC, ST & OBC
description: Large loan for SC/OBC/ST-owned Pvt Ltd or Public Limited companies.
notes: Entity must be more than 1 year old. SC/OBC up to ₹15 Cr, ST up to ₹5 Cr.

name: Globe Grant
description: Grant and fellowship open to any individual or registered entity.
amount_label: Grant up to ₹9 L + Fellowship up to ₹90 L
notes: Open to any individual and any registered entity — both for-profit and non-profit.

name: PMFME
description: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises scheme.
notes: Pradhan Mantri Formalisation of Micro food processing Enterprises.

name: Value Addition Project Subsidy (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu loan with capital subsidy for food and agri value addition.
amount_label: Loan up to ₹10 Cr (25% capital subsidy + 5% interest subsidy for 5 yrs)
notes: Tamil Nadu only. Additional 10% subsidy for women, SC/ST and industrially backward regions.

name: Pro-Fund Support
description: Accessible early-stage funding for most entity types.
notes: Broad eligibility for early-stage businesses.

name: PMEGP
description: MSME loan with 15–35% capital subsidy for new individual businesses.
amount_label: Loan up to ₹20 L (Service) / ₹50 L (Mfg) + 15–35% subsidy
notes: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme. Only for individuals with new businesses.

name: Master Fund
description: Equity funding for Pvt Ltd, LLP, and Partnerships.
notes: For Private Limited, LLP, and Partnerships only.

name: Sprint Yojna
description: Fund for for-profit entities in the animal sector.
notes: For Pvt Ltd, LLP, Partnership, Proprietorship and other for-profit entities.

name: Invoice Sahay
description: Invoice discounting loan for businesses with at least 2 years vintage.
notes: Minimum 2 years of business vintage required.

name: FIDF
description: Fisheries and Aquaculture Infrastructure Development Fund.
amount_label: Loan up to 80% of project cost (3% Interest Subsidy)
notes: For Private Companies, Entrepreneurs, Cooperative Federations, and other Institutions.

name: Livestock Fund (NLM)
description: National Livestock Mission capital subsidy for individuals and FPOs.
amount_label: Capital Subsidy up to 50% of project cost
notes: Individuals, FPO, SHG, Joint Liability Groups (JLGs), Farmer Cooperatives, Section 8, State Livestock Agencies.

name: AHIDF
description: Animal Husbandry Infrastructure Development Fund — loan for FPOs and MSMEs.
amount_label: Loan up to 90% of project cost (3% Interest Subsidy)
notes: FPOs, Startups, MSMEs, Section 8 companies.

name: Leap Fund
description: Fund for healthcare Pvt Ltd companies or those in process of formation.
notes: For Pvt Ltd (or in process of formation) in Healthcare & Bio-Tech.

name: Equity Linked Seed Fund
description: Seed fund for DPIIT healthcare startups under 5 years old.
notes: DPIIT Pvt Ltd companies under 5 years old in Healthcare & Bio-Tech.

name: RDI Fund
description: Research, Development & Innovation Fund — up to 50% of project cost.
amount_label: Financing up to 50% of total assessed project cost
notes: For Pvt Ltd, LLP, and Registered Partnerships focused on R&D and innovation.

name: Mudra Loan
description: PMMY loan for MSMEs and micro-enterprises.
notes: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana for MSMEs and micro-enterprises.

name: Investment Hub
description: Equity funding hub for entrepreneurs and companies across sectors.
notes: Open to individual entrepreneurs and all company types.

name: Atom Fund
description: Large equity fund — higher amount for AI sector, broader for all.
amount_label: Up to ₹17.9 Cr (AI sector) / ₹8.9 Cr (all sectors)
notes: AI sector gets up to ₹17.9 Cr. All other sectors up to ₹8.9 Cr (~$1M).

name: Funding Support (Guj)
description: Gujarat-only grant and fund for startups based in the state.
amount_label: Grant up to ₹30 L + Fund up to ₹3 Cr
notes: Gujarat startups only.

name: Equity Elevator
description: Equity funding for companies ready to scale.
notes: Equity-based accelerator funding.

name: SRUJAN - 2025
description: Gujarat grant for young entrepreneurs under 35.
notes: Gujarat only. Person must be under 35 years of age.

name: Inno-Preneurs
description: Large funding for innovators across entity types with a reward component.
amount_label: Up to ₹5 Cr + Reward of ₹50 L
notes: Total funding up to ₹5 Cr plus additional ₹50 L reward for top performers.

name: CGTMSE
description: Credit Guarantee for loans to entities older than 2 years.
notes: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for MSEs. Entity must be older than 2 years.

name: Sustainability Sprint
description: Funding for sustainable and eco-friendly businesses.
notes: For Pvt Ltd, LLP, and Partnerships in sustainable sectors.

name: Launch Fund
description: Two-stage funding for AI/IoT/Robotic companies — seed then follow-on.
amount_label: Seed up to ₹10 L + Follow-on up to ₹1 Cr
notes: Two-stage: Seed funding ₹10 L + Follow-on ₹1 Cr for AI/IoT/Robotic companies.

name: Renewable Energy Innovation Grant
description: Grant for individuals, MSMEs, and rural enterprises in clean energy.
notes: For Individual, Startup, MSME, Farmer groups, FPOs, and rural enterprises in clean energy.

name: AI First Fund (TG)
description: Telangana-only equity fund for DPIIT startups.
notes: Telangana State only. DPIIT recognised companies.

name: Cutting-Edge Inception
description: NVIDIA VC private funding for tech companies.
notes: Private funding from VC (NVIDIA). For cutting-edge technology companies.

name: Bankable Scheme
description: Funding for individuals aged 18–65 in Gujarat.
notes: Individual persons aged 18–65 years in Gujarat.

name: Grant for Textile
description: Dedicated grant for textile sector companies and individuals.
notes: Specifically for the Textile and Handicraft sector.

name: Fintech Bridge
description: Large equity funding for DPIIT-recognised Fintech companies.
notes: DPIIT Pvt Ltd companies in Fintech sector.

name: BI Initiative
description: Business Incubation initiative for fintech startups.
notes: Business Incubation Initiative for fintech sector startups.

name: Venture Fund for Defence & Aerospace (MH)
description: Largest defence fund — Maharashtra only for Pvt/Public Ltd companies.
notes: Maharashtra only. For Pvt Ltd and Public Ltd companies in Defence & Aerospace.

name: Defence Fund
description: Funding for defence sector entities including unregistered ones.
notes: Open to unregistered entities who agree to register.

name: Nidhi Prayas
description: Grant for individual innovators and startups with novel ideas.
notes: National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations — Prayas scheme.

name: UYEGP Scheme (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu capital subsidy for individual entrepreneurs.
notes: Tamil Nadu only. For individuals aged above 18 years.

name: ARISE Loan (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu loan with subsidy exclusively for SC/ST individuals.
amount_label: Loan up to ₹5 Cr (Capital Subsidy included)
notes: Tamil Nadu only. SC/ST individuals aged 21–55 years.

name: KKT Program (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu subsidy for new and existing entrepreneurs.
amount_label: Subsidy up to ₹5,000 (Loan up to ₹5 L)
notes: Tamil Nadu. For manufacturing, expansion and working capital needs.

name: TWEES Scheme (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu capital subsidy for women entrepreneurs.
notes: Tamil Nadu only. For Women Entrepreneurs.

name: SC/ST Startup Fund (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu seed fund for SC/ST entrepreneurs from ₹60.8 Cr corpus.
amount_label: Seed fund up to ₹50 L (₹60.8 Cr corpus)
notes: Tamil Nadu only. For SC/ST entrepreneurs.

name: NEEDS Yojana (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu subsidy for Partnership and Proprietorship businesses.
amount_label: 25% subsidy up to ₹75 L (project ₹10 L to ₹5 Cr)
notes: Tamil Nadu. Project cost must be between ₹10 L and ₹5 Cr.

name: AABCS Scheme (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu subsidy with interest subvention for SC/ST entrepreneurs.
amount_label: Grant up to ₹15 L + 5% interest subvention
notes: Tamil Nadu. Only for SC/ST communities.

name: IVP (TN)
description: Tamil Nadu grant for MSME manufacturers — prototype to commercialization.
notes: Tamil Nadu. For MSME Registered Manufacturing units.

name: Innovation Grant (KL)
description: Kerala grant for startups with Kerala Startup Mission ID.
notes: Kerala only. Must have a Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM) Unique ID.

name: AgriNext (KL)
description: Kerala grant for agri-tech DPIIT startups including FPOs.
amount_label: Up to ₹25 L (grant) + ₹50 L (product dev) + ₹5 Cr (market validation)
notes: Kerala only. DPIIT recognised startups and FPOs.

name: Seed Fund (KL)
description: Kerala seed fund for DPIIT startups with KSUM UID.
amount_label: Up to ₹15 L (grant) + ₹25 L (product dev) + ₹15 L (market validation)
notes: Kerala only. DPIIT approved startups with Kerala Startup Mission Unique ID.

name: VC FUND (KA)
description: Karnataka VC fund for various tech sectors.
notes: Karnataka based Pvt Ltd startups. For AgriTech, HealthTech, CleanTech, Media, Logistics, Retail etc.

name: Cybersecurity Incentive Policy (KA)
description: Karnataka reimbursement and R&D grant for cybersecurity companies.
amount_label: R&D grant up to 50% (max ₹3.5 Cr) + Reimbursements
notes: Karnataka only. MSMEs, SMEs, startups, MNCs working in cybersecurity solutions.

name: Fund for Agri (MH)
description: Maharashtra agri-tech fund for companies and NGOs.
notes: Maharashtra only. For Pvt Ltd, LLP, and NGOs (Not-for-profit) in agri-tech.

name: Udyami Vikas (UP)
description: Uttar Pradesh interest-free loan for young individual entrepreneurs.
amount_label: Interest-free loan up to ₹7.5 L (Phase 1: ₹5 L, Phase 2: ₹7.5 L)
notes: UP only. Individuals aged 21–40 years. Phase 2 available after repaying Phase 1.

name: Udyam Kranti Yojana (MP)
description: Madhya Pradesh loan for manufacturing and service businesses.
notes: Madhya Pradesh only. For all company types and individuals.

name: Seed Fund (BR)
description: Bihar interest-free loan for DPIIT startups under 10 years old.
notes: Bihar only. DPIIT startups. Company age must be less than 10 years.

name: Seed Fund (HR)
description: Haryana grant for DPIIT startups incubated at authorised incubators.
notes: Haryana only. Startup must be incubated at a Government authorised incubator.

name: Fund for SC Founder
description: Dedicated grant for SC-caste DPIIT company founders.
notes: SC caste founders only. DPIIT recognised companies.

name: Empower SC Entrepreneurs
description: Equity funding for companies with majority SC ownership.
notes: 51% SC candidate ownership required.

name: Young Innovators Grant
description: Grant for any individual under 25 years of age.
notes: Any individual person aged under 25 years.

name: Delta Grant for NGO
description: Grant for nonprofit organisations with future opportunity increase.
notes: For nonprofit organisations, Section 8, Trusts, and Societies.

name: Amplify Grant
description: Largest grant available for non-profit organisations.
notes: For nonprofit organisations, Section 8 companies, Trusts, and Societies.

name: SIDBI EXPRESS
description: SIDBI machinery finance for MSMEs with 3+ years of operations.
notes: MSME units with at least 3 years of operations. For plant & machinery purchase.

name: SIDBI SPEED
description: SIDBI larger machinery finance for established MSMEs.
notes: MSME units with at least 3 years of operations. For plant & machinery.

name: SIDBI Green Finance Scheme (GFS)
description: SIDBI largest loan for MSMEs in green energy activities.
notes: MSMEs in Energy Efficiency, Renewable Energy, CBG, Water/Waste Water, Solid Waste Mgmt, E-Mobility. Min 3 yrs.

name: SIDBI 4E (End to End Energy Efficiency)
description: SIDBI energy efficiency loan for MSMEs.
notes: MSMEs in green energy sector. Minimum 3 years of operation.

name: SIDBI ARISE
description: SIDBI project funding for new and existing MSME projects.
notes: Min 2 years operations with audited accounts. For land, buildings, machinery, solar installation etc.

name: SIDBI UBHARTE SITARE
description: SIDBI project funding up to 80% of project cost for new and existing projects.
amount_label: Loan up to 80% of project cost
notes: For new and existing projects. Covers land, factory, machinery, solar, energy efficiency devices.

name: SIDBI STHAPAN
description: SIDBI project funding requiring promoter experience.
notes: Promoter experience needed: 3 yrs for loans up to ₹20 Cr; 5 yrs for loans above ₹20 Cr.

name: SIDBI Working Capital
description: SIDBI working capital assistance for new and existing entities.
notes: SIDBI working capital facility for both new and existing MSME entities.

name: SIDBI SWIFT
description: SIDBI working capital loan for entities with 3 years of operations.
notes: Existing MSME entities with at least 3 years of operations.

name: SIDBI STEP
description: SIDBI operational loan for MSMEs with operating profit track record.
amount_label: Loan up to ₹3 Cr (existing) / ₹2 Cr (new customers)
notes: Min 3 years operations (2 yrs for existing SIDBI customers). Operating profit in past 2 years required.
